releaseNotes: Checklist items can now repeat on chosen days (every day, weekdays, weekends, or per-day) and items with a future due date show every day until you tick them off. Clearer Set alarm / Cancel buttons in the alarm editor. Math mission lets you pick 3, 5, 10, or 20 problems and no longer overflows long expressions. Sleep session no longer auto-ends when you dismiss the alarm — stop it manually from the Sleep tab.
